title: Thinking Out Loud
why_this_song: Romantic narrative with future tense and conditionals. Excellent for A2 students practicing 'will' + 'when' time clauses.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fall" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fall" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Will your eyes still smile from your cheeks?
Take me into your loving arms
People fall in love in mysterious ways

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the crowds don't remember my name
And maybe it's all part of a plan

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Thinking Out Loud" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Thinking Out Loud" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Thinking Out Loud" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Thinking Out Loud", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Thinking Out Loud" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Thinking Out Loud" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Clear diction, slow pace. Teaches the classic 'I will... when...' future-conditional pattern repeated throughout.
copyright_notice: Lyrics are property of Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Only short educational excerpts reproduced here under Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII and US fair-use doctrine.

lines: Take me into your loving arms
Kiss me under the light of a thousand stars
Place your head on my beating heart
Will your eyes still smile from your cheeks?
